mxCell.value: 4.3 Normalization to Third Normal Form (3NF) - With Relationship Arrows

Text: Primary Key
Text: Foreign Key

Arrows = Foreign Key relationships
Show table dependencies
Ensure data consistency
Represent 1:N or M:N relationships
Help in query joins and database integrity
4.3 Normalization to Third Normal Form (3NF) - Structure Only

Text: Primary Key
Text: Foreign Key
Same structure and colors, but without relationship arrows so you can add your own connectors manually.
